__comment__: SharkOS base-install defaults for archinstall. Disk layout, hostname, user and passwords are chosen interactively in the TUI. archinstall's JSON schema changes between releases — if a key is rejected, drop/adjust it or run plain `archinstall`.
custom_commands:
printf '
SharkOS base system. The SharkOS desktop installs automatically on first
boot, then reboots into SharkOS. If it does not, finish setup manually with:
  curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/consistentinquiry/SharkOS/main/install.sh | bash

' > /etc/motd
